description: Unusual but fully policy-compliant transaction. The system must not assert a violation - it must clear it or route to human review, never assert fraud.

transaction.description: Single emergency vendor payment approved outside business hours to meet a contractual same-week deadline; business justification documented: 'Approved late per CFO email 2026-05-16 authorizing after-hours release ahead of contract deadline; amount reflects one-time engagement scope, not split from a larger invoice.'

why_not_an_anomaly: Off-hours approval includes an explicit documented business justification, satisfying POL-HOURS-01.
Amount is below the structuring scrutiny band's intent: it reflects the full one-time engagement scope, not a split payment, per its own description.
No banking detail change, no duplicate payment pattern, and the approver has no stated vendor relationship.
